message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor client
rectangle gateway
rectangle developer-service
cylinder devs-db
circle broker
rectangle planning-service
cylinder planning-db

participant client as client1
participant gateway as gateway1
participant developer-service as developer_service1
participant devs-db as devs_db1
participant broker as broker1
participant planning-service as planning_service1
participant planning-db as planning_db1

client1 -> gateway1 : POST dev
gateway1 -> developer_service1 : POST dev
developer_service1 -> devs_db1 : persist
developer_service1 -> gateway1 : response 201
gateway1 -> client1 : 201
developer_service1 -> broker1 : emit DevCreated Event
broker1 -> planning_service1 : consume Event
planning_service1 -> planning_db1 : persist Dev

note right of client1
client
end note

note right of gateway1
gateway
end note

note right of developer_service1
developer-service
end note

note right of devs_db1
devs-db
end note

note right of broker1
broker
end note

note right of planning_service1
planning-service
end note

note right of planning_db1
planning-db
end note

@enduml
